mainEntity.name: How much temporary disability pay for forklift fracture in Taylorsville UT?
mainEntity.text: How much temporary disability pay for forklift fracture in Taylorsville UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: 66.67% of average weekly wage (AWW), max ~$1,100/week (2026), min $320 from accident date until max medical improvement.

suggestedAnswer.text: Taylorsville claims calculate AWW from prior 52 weeks—overtime boosts rate. Carriers delay payments; file 21-day notice. Attorney accelerates via hearing, adds PPI for limp.
